parameters.query: SELECT s.name AS service_name, s.price, s.duration_minutes, wt.bot_name, wt.tone, wt.display_name, wt.fallback_msg, wt.max_ai_tokens, wt.ai_enabled FROM services s JOIN tenants t ON s.tenant_id = t.id JOIN wa_tenant_config wt ON wt.tenant_slug = t.slug WHERE t.slug = '{{ $json.body.tenantSlug }}' AND s.is_active = true LIMIT 10

parameters.body:
={{ (() => { const rows = $('Load Tenant Context').all().map(i => i.json); const cfg = rows[0] || {}; const services = rows.map(r => '- ' + r.service_name + ': $' + r.price + ' MXN').join('
'); const msg = $('Webhook').item.json.body.message.content; const prompt = 'Eres ' + (cfg.bot_name || 'Asistente') + ' de ' + (cfg.display_name || 'el negocio') + '. Tono: ' + (cfg.tone || 'amigable') + '. Español mexicano. Máx ' + (cfg.max_ai_tokens || 200) + ' tokens. Sin markdown.
SERVICIOS:
' + services; return JSON.stringify({ model: 'kimi-k2.5', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: prompt }, { role: 'user', content: msg }], max_tokens: (cfg.max_ai_tokens || 200), temperature: 0.7, stream: false }); })() }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $json.phone, type: 'text', text: { body: $json.content } }) }}
